channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: The structure of innovation
item.description:
Notes:

Because technology and medicine are in a constant state of flux and innovation we have to be open to changing our minds and beliefs in order to be innovative ourselves. Innovation cannot be achieved though normal algorithmic work, where work is routine and repeated. Algorithmic work can be replaced by outsourcing, automation, or AI. Heuristic work is where you are experimenting and creating something new. This is where innovation can be found.

Source:

  • Pink, D. H. (2011). Drive: The Surprising Truth About What Motivates Us. Riverhead Books.
  • Grant, A. M. (2021). Think again: The power of knowing what you don’t know.
